---
title: "Tables & Figures"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-23"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

str(sensitivityRepeatedMetrics) <- readRDS("results/simulation/sensitivity_repeated_metrics.rds")
sensitivitySingleMetrics <- readRDS("results/simulation/sensitivity_single_metrics.rds")
```

```{r}
summarise_metrics <- function(df, label, weight) {
  df %>%
    group_by(method, signal_weight) %>%
    filter(signal_weight == weight) %>%
    summarise(
      dataset  = label,
      mean_TPR = mean(TPR, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_TPR   = sd(TPR,   na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_FDR = mean(FDR, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_FDR   = sd(FDR,   na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups  = "drop"
    )
}

bind_rows(
  summarise_metrics(sensitivityRepeatedMetrics, "Repeated", 0.99),
  summarise_metrics(sensitivitySingleMetrics,   "Single", 0.99)
)
```


```{r}
# в”Ђв”Ђ Summarise: mean TPR and FDR per method x signal_weight в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
summarise_metrics <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    group_by(method, signal_weight) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_TPR = mean(TPR, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_FDR = mean(FDR, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_TPR   = sd(TPR, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_FDR   = sd(FDR, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups  = "drop"
    )
}

singleSummary   <- summarise_metrics(sensitivitySingleMetrics)
repeatedSummary <- summarise_metrics(sensitivityRepeatedMetrics)

# в”Ђв”Ђ Method colour palette (shared across all plots) в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
METHOD_COLOURS <- c(
  "Flat BH"       = "#E41A1C",
  "Flat BY"       = "#FF7F00",
  "TreeBH"        = "#4DAF4A",
  "DART"          = "#984EA3",
  "pfilter"       = "#377EB8",
  "Ours"          = "#000000",
  "ClusterTrim_BY"= "#A65628"
)

# в”Ђв”Ђ Helper: TPR + FDR line plot в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
plot_sensitivity <- function(summary_df, scenario_title) {
  
  tpr_plot <- summary_df %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = signal_weight, y = mean_TPR,
               colour = method, group = method)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = METHOD_COLOURS) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(summary_df$signal_weight)) +
    labs(
      title  = paste(scenario_title, "вЂ” TPR"),
      x      = "Signal Weight",
      y      = "Mean TPR",
      colour = "Method"
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  fdr_plot <- summary_df %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = signal_weight, y = mean_FDR,
               colour = method, group = method)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
    scale_colour_manual(values = METHOD_COLOURS) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(summary_df$signal_weight)) +
    labs(
      title  = paste(scenario_title, "вЂ” FDR"),
      x      = "Signal Weight",
      y      = "Mean FDR",
      colour = "Method"
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  list(tpr = tpr_plot, fdr = fdr_plot)
}

# в”Ђв”Ђ Generate plots в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
singlePlots   <- plot_sensitivity(singleSummary,   "Single Measure")
repeatedPlots <- plot_sensitivity(repeatedSummary, "Repeated Measures")

singlePlots$tpr
singlePlots$fdr
repeatedPlots$tpr
repeatedPlots$fdr

# в”Ђв”Ђ Table: results at signal_weight == 0.99 (your main experiment) в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
table_at_99_sd <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    filter(signal_weight == 0.99) %>%
    group_by(method) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_TPR = mean(TPR, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_TPR   = sd(TPR,   na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_FDR = mean(FDR, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_FDR   = sd(FDR,   na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_F1  = mean(F1,  na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_F1    = sd(F1,    na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups  = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_TPR))
}

singleSD   <- table_at_99_sd(sensitivitySingleMetrics)
repeatedSD <- table_at_99_sd(sensitivityRepeatedMetrics)

print(singleSD)
print(repeatedSD)
```
